data.title: Bitget CEO: Abnormal APP quotes are affected by historical message delays. Trading, deposit and withdrawal services are normal and user assets are safe.
data.description: Bitget CEO Gracy Chen posted on X that the team has noticed that some users have received unusual market quote notifications on the Bitget app over the past 30 minutes. This is due to historical message delivery delays. Officials are working with the service provider to resolve this issue, which only affects price notifications. All trading, deposit, and withdrawal services remain normal, and user assets are completely safe.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 112,000 USDT with a 7.79% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 11, 2025, 07:00 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 112,000 USDT and is now trading at 111,914.351563 USDT, with a narrowed 7.79% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitcoin Tests Key Support Level Amid Market Uncertainty
data.description: According to BlockBeats, recent data from CryptoOnchain indicates that Bitcoin is currently testing a critical support level, known as the 'cost price defense line' of new major investors. This line represents the average holding cost of significant new market entrants. Historically, large investors have often defended this cost line to avoid losses, with this position serving as a strong demand bottom multiple times since August, including twice recently. The central question facing the market now is whether these major investors will intervene to support the price again. The upcoming market movements at this key level are crucial.

data.description: On Oct 11, 2025, 06:56 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 1,100 USDT and is now trading at 1,097.930054 USDT, with a narrowed 13.56% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Hyperliquid: Platform traffic and transaction volume hit record highs, with no downtime or delays on the blockchain network
data.description: Hyperliquid stated in a statement that during recent market volatility, the Hyperliquid blockchain experienced no downtime or latency despite record-breaking traffic and transaction volumes. HyperBFT consensus and execution gracefully handled the throughput spike. This served as a significant stress test, demonstrating the robustness and scalability of Hyperliquid's decentralized and fully on-chain financial system. The system's risk and margin implementation performed as designed, ensuring the platform's solvency during periods of extreme volatility.

data.title: US crypto stocks fell across the board last night, with CRCL, BMNR, and SBET falling by more than 10%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, US stocks closed down 1.9% on Friday, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average, the S&P 500 down 2.7%, and the Nasdaq Composite down 3.5%. Both the Nasdaq and S&P 500 experienced their largest single-day declines since April 10th. Cryptocurrency stocks also fell, including Circle (CRCL) down 11.67%; Bitmine (BMNR) down 12.18%; SharpLink Gaming (SBET) down 12.63%; and Gemini (GEMI) down 9.45%.

data.title: DWF Labs partner: None of its affiliates have been liquidated, and USDF and Falcon Stable have withstood the test.
data.description: Andrei Grachev, managing partner of DWF Labs, posted on X that USDF did not decouple during this decline; neither DWF nor its affiliates' positions were liquidated during this crash; and the Falcon Stable strategy was quite profitable.

data.title: Young Trader Ray's Bold Bitcoin Strategy Amid Market Volatility
data.description:
According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, data from HyperInsight reveals that a young trader known as Ray has recently initiated a significant Bitcoin position. Approximately seven hours ago, Ray established a long position at a price of $111,200, employing a rolling accumulation strategy to acquire around 548 BTC. The current value of this position is approximately $61.81 million, although Ray's account is currently experiencing an unrealized loss of $1.56 million.

Historical trading records indicate that Ray has previously achieved substantial profits, turning an initial capital of $240,000 into $6 million within a month. His highest single-day profit reached $5.92 million USDC.

BlockBeats advises investors to exercise caution as the cryptocurrency market has been experiencing heightened volatility recently, emphasizing the importance of risk management.

data.title: BlockRock's Black Swan Strategy Yields Significant Returns Amid Market Downturn
data.description:
According to Foresight News, BlockRock's latest "Black Swan Strategy" product has achieved up to 60-fold returns during the recent market downturn. This strategy is one of the few that has managed to rise against the prevailing market trends.

BlockRock's Black Swan product employs an on-chain tail risk hedge, designed to help investors maintain stability and profit inversely during extreme market conditions. The company emphasizes that the strategy's goal is not to predict market crashes but to enable investors to capture substantial gains through structured allocation when such events occur.

data.title: Market Makers Often Act as Takers, Says Mango Labs Founder
data.description:
According to PANews, Dov, the founder of Mango Labs, has stated that many so-called 'market makers' actually function as market takers, typically not placing maker orders and instead using Time-Weighted Average Price (TWAP) strategies to sell gradually. He noted that market makers often withdraw liquidity about a week after a new coin is listed, due to the high cost of capital and the large number of projects. They are most active during the first week of trading.

Dov highlighted that Jump Trading engages in approximately 30 projects annually, providing liquidity in a more systematic manner, which results in more stable project performance. He also mentioned that many altcoins can experience a decline of 70% to 80% with trading volumes of only tens of millions of dollars.

data.title: A new address withdrew 24,409 ETH from Kraken 2 hours ago, worth $93.18 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a newly created wallet withdrew 24,409 ETH worth $93.18 million from Kraken two hours ago. Another whale address, also known as 0xedf, received 8,914 ETH worth $34.1 million from FalconX and currently holds 28,933 ETH, valued at $110 million.

data.title: Hong Kong Government Announces Fifth Batch of Key Enterprises
data.description: According to PANews, the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region government has released the fifth batch of key enterprises, with nearly 40% being overseas companies. These enterprises span sectors such as artificial intelligence, bio-health, and cultural and creative technology. Among them, the blockchain protocol project Polkadot plans to establish a presence in Hong Kong to engage in research and business development. Over the past two years, the Hong Kong government has attracted a total of 102 enterprises, which are expected to bring approximately 60 billion HKD in investments and create around 22,000 quality jobs.

data.title: Planet Noon News
data.description: 1. The amount of liquidated positions on the Hyperliquid platform in the past 24 hours has exceeded $10 billion, setting a new record high. 2. Data: Bitmine's ETH holdings have a floating loss of approximately $1.93 billion, with an average purchase price of $4,535. 3. Arthur Hayes: The prices of most high-quality altcoins will not return to their liquidation lows in the short term. 4. The whale who opened a short position three days in advance and made a profit of $200 million is suspected to be Bitforex co-founder Garrett Jin. 7. Crypto influencers: The market crash may be due to the combined impact of USDe revolving loans, increased margin leverage, and Trump's trade war. 9. Yi Lihua: There was no insider information behind the liquidation, it was simply because investment research data indicated a fall; 10. Crypto.com CEO and Wintermute team members responded to market FUD: Institutions are operating normally, and rumors of a crash are false; 11. Bitcoin OG has closed most of his short positions, making over $160 million in profits in 30 hours; 12. Analysis: The actual market liquidation amount today may exceed $40 billion; 13. Aave founder: The protocol liquidated a record $180 million in collateral assets in one hour; 14. data.title: XRP Crashes 40%, Before Recovering, in Biggest One-Day Drop
data.description:
XRP experienced a significant decline of 40% in its value during a single day, marking the largest drop recorded within a 24-hour period. However, following this dramatic plunge, the cryptocurrency made a notable recovery, regaining some of its lost value as traders and investors reacted to the market's volatility.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/10/11/xrp-crashes-40-before-recovering-in-biggest-one-day-drop

data.title: A heavily invested Chinese meme address suffered a floating loss of $3.39 million, accounting for nearly 80% of Binance’s total losses.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi's monitoring, a certain address's six Meme token positions on BSC have accumulated a floating loss of US$3.39 million, of which the unrealized loss on Binance Life is as high as US$2.71 million, accounting for 79.7% of the total floating loss. Only Hakimi's position is in a floating profit state.
